name: E-Commerce Platform Rebuild
description: Complete rebuild of the client's e-commerce platform with modern architecture, real-time inventory, AI-powered product recommendations, and seamless checkout flow.

requirements.description: Product catalog with categories, filters, and full-text search
Secure checkout with Stripe payment gateway and order confirmation emails
AI-powered product recommendations based on user browsing history
Real-time inventory management with low-stock alerts and automatic reorder triggers

tasks.title: Product Catalog API
tasks.description: Build REST API for product listing, filtering, and full-text search using ElasticSearch
tasks.output_summary: Product API with ElasticSearch integration, supports category filtering and text search

tasks.title: Stripe Payment Integration
tasks.description: Integrate Stripe Checkout and handle webhooks for payment confirmation
tasks.output_summary: Stripe integration complete with webhook handling and order email notifications

tasks.title: Recommendation Engine
tasks.description: Collaborative filtering model for product recommendations using user behaviour data

tasks.title: Inventory Service
tasks.description: Real-time inventory tracking with WebSocket updates and reorder alerts

tasks.title: CI/CD Pipeline
tasks.description: GitHub Actions pipeline with staging and production deployments
tasks.output_summary: Full CI/CD with Docker, staging environment, and automated tests

tasks.title: Admin Dashboard Redesign
tasks.description: Redesign admin UI with new colour scheme and improved navigation
tasks.output_summary: Admin dashboard redesigned with new branding

deliverables.title: Product Catalog Module
deliverables.description: Deployed product API with search and filter capabilities

notes.content: Inventory service is blocked pending vendor API credentials. Client follow-up required.
